---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for an Adiscon product
title: "[Feature] "
labels:
  - type:feature-request
  - status:needs-triage
---

## Product

Which product is this request related to?

- [ ] WinSyslog
- [ ] EventReporter
- [ ] rsyslog Windows Agent
- [ ] MonitorWare Agent
- [ ] General / multiple products

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

What is difficult or missing today?

## Proposed Feature

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

Focus on the outcome rather than implementation details.

## Use Case

How would this feature be used in practice?

Example scenarios help us understand the request.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you found a workaround or alternative solution?

## Additional Context

Add any additional information that may help understand the request.

Examples:

- screenshots
- configuration examples
- links to documentation
